text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Conduct yourself more like a queen..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Have the dignity of an athlete..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Be graceful, like a young lady..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "You need to be more like—"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Kawakami, what's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Whoa?! Are you sure? You look like you've seen a
ghost or something.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oho... ohoho, I'm fine. It's truly nothing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Kinko Sho, and I'm waiting for
Kawakami Princess at the academy gate.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hello! Are you Kawakami's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huuuh, I seeee... Okay, I'm Pearl—Kawakami's
roommate.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
She's racing today, right? I want you to give her a
message for me.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Tell her to dance passionately as she makes her
way through life! I'm always here to support her!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Thank you!
...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Last night, my little Kawakami seemed so shaken.
I'm confident there's something she's conflicted
about.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I've always liked Kawakami. I liked her when she
was all brawn, and I like her now with her earnest
ambition.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: I hope you'll remember that. Adieu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, in the waiting room for the Kinko Sho...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It may be just a G2 race, but I declared this as my
next goal.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My fans and everyone else know that I'm running
today.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, there's something I want to tell everyone
once I'm in the paddock.
choice_data_list: Is this something you're sure you want to say?
Is this something you're sure you want to say?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's almost time for the runners to enter the
paddock. You want to go see it?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Definitely! I've been watching Kawakami's races
ever since that live broadcast!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Kawakami! Tear down the track like you
always do!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Make that dazzling pose and shout, "I am a
princess!"

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's she doing? Bowing politely isn't like
her at all...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
U-um, I... Just like I proclaimed on TV, I will
become a queenly queen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll conduct myself in a manner befitting a racer.
I'll be honest and considerate toward others and
not hurt anyone.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll endeavor to behave in a way I can be proud
of—both as an Umamusume and as a queen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
In other words... I'll live true to myself... without
discarding my dignity. I hope to have your
continued support...
